{"code":";; Step 1: Find the UNRESOLVED Sentry issue with highest users_affected
(def unresolved-sentry-issues 
  (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"}))

(def top-sentry-issue
  (first (sort-by :users_affected > unresolved-sentry-issues)))

;; Extract service name and issue id
top-sentry-issue"}

{"code":";; Different approach - force map to realize
(def triggered-incidents
  (pagerduty_incidents {:service "api-gateway"
                        :status "triggered"}))

;; Use doall to force lazy sequence evaluation
(doall (map (fn [inc] 
              (update! :pagerduty_incidents {:id (:id inc)} {:status "acknowledged"}))
            triggered-incidents))

"Map executed""}
